message:
test(unit): expand r_tree.rs inline tests from 17 to 48 (+31) (ft-jkb6c)

Cover Rect geometry edge cases (swapped coords, zero area, union,
enlargement, boundary containment, edge/corner overlap), empty tree
queries, split behavior, brute-force nearest verification on 30 rects,
negative coordinates, point rects, serde query preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
